name: zo-raycast
title: Zo
description: Chat with Zo models, manage defaults, and review activity
author: skeletorjs

commands.name: zo-setup
commands.title: Zo Setup
commands.subtitle: Validate and Diagnose
commands.description: Validate credentials and check Zo API connectivity

commands.name: zo-chat
commands.title: Zo Chat
commands.subtitle: Conversation
commands.description: Chat with Zo models through the Zo API

commands.name: zo-models
commands.title: Zo Models
commands.subtitle: Model Management
commands.description: Browse available Zo models and set defaults

commands.name: zo-activity
commands.title: Zo Activity
commands.subtitle: History and Replay
commands.description: Review recent Zo runs and replay safe operations

preferences.name: zoApiBaseUrl
preferences.title: Zo API Base URL
preferences.description: Base URL for Zo REST API requests

preferences.name: requestTimeoutMs
preferences.title: Request Timeout (ms)
preferences.description: Timeout applied to Zo API requests

preferences.name: maxRetries
preferences.title: Max Retries
preferences.description: Retry attempts for transient network failures

preferences.name: enableChatStreaming
preferences.title: Enable Chat Streaming
preferences.label: Stream responses as they arrive
preferences.description: When disabled, Zo Chat waits for the final response instead of streaming chunks

scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run format
